task_completion.description: Navigate to the WooCommerce Products list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WooCommerce 'Products' page is visible in the Firefox browser, displaying a list of store products.

task_completion.description: Open the target product for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit product' page specifically for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' is open in the browser.
In the 'Product data' section (under the 'General' tab), the 'Regular price ($)' input field contains the exact value '59.99'.
In the 'Product data' section (under the 'General' tab), the 'Sale price ($)' input field contains the exact value '49.99'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the product
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Product updated.' confirmation message is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Update' button in the Publish widget has been clicked and the page has reloaded with the new prices saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox GUI to update the product
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WooCommerce web interface in Firefox, not terminal commands (like wp-cli) being executed to update the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual web application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display a real Firefox browser window with the standard WordPress/WooCommerce admin panel UI, rather than a text editor or a script output.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply paste the expected output into an unrelated text field
integrity.visual_evidence: The prices '59.99' and '49.99' are entered into the correct, specific WooCommerce pricing input fields, not just typed into a search bar or a random text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001). Original regular price: $79.99. Expected new regular price: $59.99. Expected new sale price: $49.99.
